body_txt: The ability to manipulate the weather, a stock superpower . This is a Combo Platter of Elemental Powers : Blow You Away , Making a Splash , An Ice Person , Shock and Awe and thermal manipulation. Weather manipulation is very versatile. For example, using the wind, some weather manipulators can fly . And, as everyone knows, Lightning Can Do Anything . This is also known as either " atmokinesis " or " meteorokinesis ". Sometimes these powers are used for Painting the Frost on Windows . The difference between Elemental Powers and weather manipulation is that storm manipulation is limited to the elements that make up the weather. Compare with Weather-Control Machine , for when you need a dash of Applied Phlebotinum to achieve the same ends. Compare Artificial Outdoors Display for when even the weather itself isn't real. When the weather itself is actively magical, as opposed to simply magically-induced, see Storm of Magic . See also Cloud-Clearing Burst . For deities who preside over storms and weather, as opposed to mortal-level characters with weather-related powers, see God of Thunder .
